svg.text: Manage all your locations from one dashboard. Each location is fully independent.
123 Main St, New York, NY · Location ID: loc_01
All locations share same menu (edits apply everywhere)
Airport location has +15% price markup applied
Allow per-location item availability (86'd per location)
Corporate can view all location data
Franchise locations cannot see each other's data
Corporate can push menu updates to franchises
Each location = separate pos_location row. RLS policies scope all pos_* tables by location_id.
Menu sync: pos_menu_items.location_id = NULL for shared items; location_id = X for per-location overrides.
Franchise royalty: pos_royalty_configs + daily cron calculates on pos_payments.
Corporate dashboard: cross-location aggregation via Supabase RPC (admin role bypasses RLS).
Franchise invite: email → new Supabase user → scoped to location_id via RLS policy.
Schema: pos_locations · pos_menu_items · pos_royalty_configs · pos_payments · pos_location_users
